description:
Best to Worst Health Insurance Companies (2022–2025) | Based on REAL Claims Data

I Analyzed 3 Years of Health Insurance Claims Data — India’s Real Best & Worst Companies!

India’s BEST & WORST Health Insurance Companies — 3 Years of Real Claim Results!

I spent last month analyzing health insurance claims data from 2022 to 2025 to find out which health insurance companies in India actually keep their promises. The results shocked me — and they'll change how you choose your health insurance forever.
🔍 What I Analyzed:
I examined 5 critical metrics that truly matter when you file a claim:
✅ Claim Settlement Ratio (CSR) — How many claims get approved
✅ Claims Paid Ratio — How much money you actually receive
✅ Complaints per 10,000 Claims — Real customer experience data
✅ Incurred Claim Ratio (ICR) — Premium vs claims paid balance
✅ Solvency Margin — Financial strength to pay future claims

📲 Book Consultation Call - https://bit.ly/3FJium2
🔔 Join the Impact Buddy family - https://bit.ly/4l7cvra      
Join 🟢💬 WhatsApp & Stay ahead ! 📢✨ https://bit.ly/4hrGGGL

📊 Why This Analysis is Different:
Most people only look at Claim Settlement Ratio and think that's enough. But here's the truth: a company can approve 95% of claims (high CSR) but pay only 70% of the claimed amount. That's why I created a comprehensive ranking system weighing all 5 metrics.

💡 Key Findings:
CSR alone doesn't tell the full story of claim payments
Some "popular" insurers rank surprisingly low on actual claim payouts
Best health insurance companies balance high CSR with high claims paid ratio
Complaint data reveals which insurers have smooth claim processes vs which make you fight for every rupee
Solvency matters more than you think for long-term protection

🎯 Who This Video is For:
→ Anyone buying health insurance in India for the first time
→ People planning to switch health insurance companies
→ Those who want to compare health insurance policies based on real data
→ Family breadwinners looking for best mediclaim policy
→ Anyone tired of misleading health insurance advertisements

📈 What You'll Learn:
Best health insurance companies in India for 2025
Worst health insurance companies to avoid
How to read claim settlement ratio correctly
What claims paid ratio really means for your pocket
Which insurers have lowest complaint rates
How ICR affects your premium increases
Real health insurance comparison based on 3 years of data
Top health insurance plans that actually pay claims

⚠️ Important Note:
This ranking is based purely on data from FY 2022-23, 2023-24, and 2024-25. I'm not sponsored by any insurance company. This is an independent analysis to help you make informed decisions.

🏥 Top Insurance Companies Analyzed:
Star Health Insurance | HDFC Ergo Health | Care Health Insurance | Niva Bupa | Manipal Cigna | Aditya Birla Health | ICICI Lombard Health | Bajaj Allianz Health | New India Assurance | Oriental Insurance | National Insurance | and more...
📅 Timestamps:
0:00 - Yeh Video Kyon Zaruri Hai? | Introduction
01:41 Data Comparison Ka Tarika | Methodology
04:15 5 Important Metrics Ki Puri Jankari | Ratio Analysis
13:21 Performance Heatmap | Company-wise Detailed Analysis
21:19 Ranking Ka Tarika | Weightage System Explained
23:21 Best Se Worst Tak Complete Ranking | Final Results
26:44 Aapke Liye Last Advice | Final Recommendations


💬 Let's Discuss:
Which health insurance company are you currently with? Have you ever faced claim rejection? Share your experience in the comments below — your story might help thousands of others make better decisions!

👍 If This Helped You:

Like this video if you found it valuable
Subscribe for more data-driven insurance analysis
Share with family and friends who need health insurance
Hit the bell icon for updates on best insurance policies 2025

📢 Want Personalized Help?
Drop your questions in the comments and I'll respond personally. I read every comment and try to help everyone choose the best health insurance for their family.

comments.text:
Hats off. However, cashless network range does matter a lot. After analysing the data I also chose Bajaj but the hospital I mostly visit does not cover certain common surgery against Bajaj. Similarly some hospitals covers only surgical treatment for Care Insurance. 
Moral of the story is , the main Goal of the hospitals and private insurance company is to make profit first.
If you go by the data, logically New India is the best. It got lower score due to its high claim approval ratio and low deduction. It indeed affect the company’s health but it is backed by the GoI. 
My corporate policy is New India. I am using it for a decade. Logged multiple claims with a 100% success rate. Once it was rejected but completely reimbursed.
The network hospital coverage is awesome. I think people should also call or visit the major hospital insurance desk and ask them for the reality of claim settlement by the insurance companies. Then people should make a wise choice. Data speaks a lot.Taking decision without data analysis is foolishness but please verify from the hospitals as well.

comments.author: @KaileshHambire

comments.text:
Wow, First of all thank you Harvinder Singh ji  for considering my suggestion on your poll and you have done this commendable work. Hats off to you for this mammoth comparison.

According to the video's Performance Heat Map the insurance companies we can consider are (All companies with red columns are excluded because they need serious improvement in their numbers):
1. Bajaj (Bajaj plans are not very comprehensive).
2. HDFC
3. TATA
4. ACKO (Material Change Clause and It’s new in this market and that's why early to bet on it)
5. SBI General (Material Change Clause is the reason for not going for it)

Out of these five insurance companies HDFC ERGO and TATA AIG  are the two for final selection and out of these five insurance companies HDFC ERGO and TATA AIG are the one which gives us comprehensive coverage plan considering the age of the individual at 27 and from Delhi with a sum Assured of 25 Lakh.

Now comes the cost, as we all know HDFC cost will be a pain in long run and TATA cost will also be a pain (less) in long run but out of these two it is difficult to say which 1 is worth to be your companion.

So, choose wisely according to your pocket requirements.

Note: It’s my personal view and you are free to choose anyone out of these five (Given above) health insurance companies. These the best insurance companies (Perception is made after review of the data provided in the video). 

At last again thank you for this video.

comments.text: Bhai claim paid ratio vs Incurred claim ratio same hote hain? Matlab to same hi hain🙏🙏
comments.author: @8dtime441

comments.text:
Nahin bhai difference hai.
Incurred claim ratio is claims cost vs premium earned. Incurred claim ratio also includes some adjustments. 

Claims paid  ratio is  claim amount paid vs total amount claimed.
